title: Seth Rogen and Evan Goldberg Say Catherine O’Hara’s Death Sent “Shock Waves” Through ‘The Studio’ Season 2: “We Are Not Ignoring It”
summary: In an interview with The Times, Rogen noted that they are "acknowledging" O'Hara's death on the upcoming installment, with Goldberg adding that "it has been an unbelievable challenge" navigating her absence.

title: U.S. Auto Industry Proposes Vehicle Fee to Replace Gas Tax
summary: The growing share of electric vehicles and the expected increase in EV sales this year amid soaring gasoline prices are reducing the revenues for the U.S. Highway Trust Fund, which pays for America’s roads. title: U.S. Battery Expansion Surges Ahead of Demand Curve
summary: The United States is rapidly becoming a major international battery manufacturing power, as it works to compete with other producers, such as China. title: How the U.S. and Europe Are Betting Differently on Energy Security
summary: Europe is making a push for a robust homegrown offshore wind sector at the same time that the United States is gutting its own. title: Europe must prepare for ‘long-lasting’ energy shock, EU warns
summary: Energy commissioner says bloc is assessing fuel rationing and releasing more oil from strategic reserves
